description: city in and seat of San Bernardino County, California, United States
description_wiki: San Bernardino (  SAN BUR-nə-DEE-noh) is a city in and the county seat of San Bernardino County, California, United States.

description: air warfare branch of the U.S. Army from 1926 to 1947
description_wiki: The United States Army Air Corps (USAAC) was the aerial warfare service component of the United States Army between 1926 and 1941.

description: 1939–1945 global conflict
description_wiki: World War II, or the Second World War (1 September 1939 – 2 September 1945), was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers.

description: numbered air force (NAF) of the United States Air Force's Air Force Global Strike Command (AFGSC)
description_wiki: The Eighth Air Force (Air Forces Strategic) is a numbered air force (NAF) of the United States Air Force's Air Force Global Strike Command (AFGSC).

description: armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.

aliases: War to Resist US Aggression and Aid Korea
description: war between North and South Korea, 1950–1953
description_wiki: The Korean War (25 June 1950 – 27 July 1953) was an armed conflict the Korean Peninsula fought between North Korea (Democratic People's Republic of Korea; DPRK) and South Korea (Republic of Korea; ROK) and their allies.

description: numbered air force of the United States Air Force
description_wiki: The Fifteenth Air Force (15 AF) is a numbered air force of the United States Air Force's Air Combat Command (ACC).

description: city in Los Angeles County, California, United States
description_wiki: Pomona (  pə-MOH-nə) is a city in the San Gabriel Valley of eastern Los Angeles County, California, United States.

description: private liberal arts college in Claremont, California, United States
description_wiki: Pomona College (  pə-MOH-nə) is a private college in Claremont, California, United States.

description: private university in La Verne, California
description_wiki: The University of La Verne (ULV) is a private university in La Verne, California, United States.

surface_forms: the Japanese had bombed Pearl Harbor
description: 1941 Japanese surprise attack on the U.S
description_wiki: On December 7, 1941, the Empire of Japan launched a surprise military strike on the United States Pacific Fleet at its naval base at Pearl Harbor on Oahu, Hawaii.

description: maritime branch of the United States military
description_wiki: The United States Navy (USN) is the maritime service branch of the United States Armed Forces and is designated as the navy of the United States in the Constitution.

surface_forms: March Air Force Base in Riverside, California
description: military air base in Riverside County, California
description_wiki: March Air Reserve Base (IATA: RIV, ICAO: KRIV, FAA LID: RIV) (March ARB), previously known as March Air Force Base (March AFB), is a United States Air Force Reserve base located in Riverside County, California, between the cities of Riverside, Moreno Valley, and Perris.

description: former military base in Orange County, California
description_wiki: Santa Ana Army Air Base (SAAAB) was a World War II-era air base located near Santa Ana, California.

description: seat of Maricopa County, largest city in, and capital of, the State of Arizona, United States
description_wiki: Phoenix (  FEE-niks) is the capital and most populous city of the U.S. state of Arizona.

description: used on US bombers during World War II, the Korean War, and the Vietnam War
description_wiki: The Norden Mk.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: New Mexico is a landlocked state in the Southwestern region of the United States.

description: city in and county seat of Pima County, Arizona, United States
description_wiki: Tucson (; O'odham: Cuk Ṣon; Spanish: Tucsón) is the county seat of and the most populated city in Pima County, Arizona, United States.

description: US Air Force base in Tucson, Arizona, United States
city in Otero County, New Mexico, United States
description_wiki: Alamogordo () is a city in and the county seat of Otero County, New Mexico, United States.

description: capital of the state of Kansas, United States; county seat of Shawnee County
description_wiki: Topeka ( tə-PEE-kə) is the capital city of the U.S. state of Kansas and the county seat of Shawnee County.

description: country in north-west Europe, part of the United Kingdom
description_wiki: England is a country that is part of the United Kingdom.

description: capital city of Scotland, UK
description_wiki: Edinburgh is the capital city of Scotland and one of its 32 council areas.

description: capital and largest city of England and the United Kingdom
description_wiki: London is the capital and largest city of England and the United Kingdom, with a population of 9.1 million people in 2024.

description: bay in England, UK
description_wiki: The Wash is a shallow natural rectangular bay and multiple estuary on the east coast of England in the United Kingdom.

description: city in Prahova County, Romania
description_wiki: Ploiești (UK:  ploy-ESH-tee, US:  plaw-YESHT-ee, Romanian: [ploˈjeʃtʲ]), formerly spelled Ploești, is a city and county seat in Prahova County, Romania.

second largest city in Libya
description_wiki: Benghazi () (lit. 'Son of [the] Ghazi') is the second-most-populous city in Libya as well as the largest city in Cyrenaica, with an estimated population of 859,000 in 2023.

description: country in southern Europe
description_wiki: Italy, officially the Italian Republic, is a country in Southern and Western Europe.

description: capital and largest city of Italy
description_wiki: Rome is the capital city and most populated comune (municipality) of Italy.

description: German fighter aircraft
description_wiki: The Messerschmitt Me 262, nicknamed Schwalbe (German for "Swallow") in fighter versions, or Sturmvogel ("Storm Bird") in fighter-bomber versions, is a fighter aircraft and fighter-bomber that was designed and produced by the German aircraft manufacturer Messerschmitt.

description: country in Southeast Europe
description_wiki: Romania is a country in Southeast and Central Europe.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Idaho ( , EYE-də-hoe) is a landlocked state in the Pacific Northwest and Mountain West subregions of the Western United States.

description: autonomous territory of the Kingdom of Denmark and world's largest island
description_wiki: Greenland is an autonomous territory of the Kingdom of Denmark and is the largest of the kingdom's three constituent parts by land area, the others being Denmark proper and the Faroe Islands.
